channel.title: Konstantinos Zoropoulos | BSc Candidate
channel.description: Recent content on Konstantinos Zoropoulos | BSc Candidate

item.title: mmWave Fall Detection System
item.description: A commercial-grade fall detection system for the elderly using mmWave sensors and ESP32 microcontrollers.

item.title: Educational Data Normalization Pipeline
item.description: Data extraction and normalization pipeline for educational course data from multiple web sources.

item.title: Custom SQL Lexer and Parser
item.description: Engineering of a custom lexical analyzer and parser utilizing Flex, Bison, and C.

item.title: Modular Arithmetic Calculator
item.description: Design and implementation of a fully functional, battery-powered calculator built on the Arduino platform.

item.title: About me
item.description: Personal and professional profile of Konstantinos Zoropoulos, undergraduate Computer Engineering student at the University of Patras.

item.title: Academic Profile
item.description: Overview of academic background, coursework, and supplementary training.
